name: Contra-Directional Book Consensus (Reversion)
hypothesis: A high ask wall (large `ask_depth_concentration`) combined with deep-book selling pressure (large `obi_ex_bbo`) signals overwhelming, persistent sell-side interest, predicting a downward price move. This reverts to a previously successful logic after a detrimental filter was added.
mutation_note: Based on feedback to `drop_feature`, this spec reverts to the logic of the parent's parent (`iter019_contra_consensus_tight_obi`), which had high WR. It drops the detrimental `trade_imbalance_signed` filter.
